2026-06-11TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Saint John Port AuthorityAppointment of Charlie Harling of Rothesay, New Brunswick, to be a director of the Saint John Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, in the place of Thomas Gerard O’Neil, whose term has expired.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Saint John Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Charlie Harling of Rothesay, New Brunswick, to be a director of the Saint John Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, in the place of Thomas Gerard O’Neil, whose term has expired.
